name: Emoji Merge: Pop Frenzy
description: Link at least 2 matching emojis to pop them! Connect longer chains for bigger scores and explosive power-ups. Smash through obstacles like crates and stones, and let the cute sloth cheer you on in Adventure and Endless modes. Easy one-finger controls make it perfect for quick, addictive fun—download now and merge to win!
instructions: Connect 2 or more adjacent matching emojis to pop them Drag your finger to link longer chains for higher scores and powerful boosters Tap obstacles to break them with power-ups Use simple one-finger control anytime anywhere
